items.name_en: 【Factory Leather】🔥 As a brand classic, GG Supreme canvas has become the iconic fabric of the Gucci design world. This fabric frequently appears in new brand series and is reinterpreted through a Gucci aesthetic perspective. This mini handbag is fully decorated with the brand's classic interlocking pattern. Classic interlocking double G accessories add brand identity charm to this piece.

items.name_cn:
【Factory Leather】🔥Bulk stock Gucci Dionysus 28
【Top-tier Replica】 🔥Comes with packaging, the Eternal Green model,
Dionysus is arguably the turning point for Gucci's revival.
It has been popular for years and remains a staple.
The biggest advantage is its durability; it is truly super tough.
It can be thrown around and used freely. The durable GG material is thick,
so it is not as delicate as lambskin or calf leather.
The GG logo is the symbol of Gucci and matches any outfit,
never going out of style. The capacity is unquestionable.
Model 400249, comes with original packaging
Dimensions 28x18x9cm

items.name_cn:
【Factory Leather】¥Bulk stock🔥Gucci Horsebit 1955
【Top-tier】¥🔥I was sold by the packaging,
I decided to make this the moment I saw it!
But I was shallow; the packaging is nothing,
the bag itself is absolutely stunning!
It is very stylish. The Horsebit hardware is never ugly!
Many fashion brands have incorporated the Horsebit element this year.
I kept this one. Great price, a steal!
Got one for my boyfriend too. A couple's bag, isn't that nice?
Model 625615
Dimensions 17x11x4cm

items.name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】 Bulk Stock🔥GG Diana🆕Canvas Bamboo
【Top-tier Original Batch】 New element, stunning!! 👏 I have a unique preference for bamboo, mini 20cm
I always feel that bamboo should be associated with fashion and become a classic
Unique pairings always have unexpected color collisions,
Unexpectedly, this retro element has amazed me again,
After all, for a brand like GG,
The most rare thing is not a sudden flash of inspiration
But the ability to pass on the founder's spirit generation after generation
Mini 655661 (20x16x10cm)
Small 660195 (27x24x11cm)
